description: This file defines a utility object StringUtils providing methods for joining a LinkedList into a String and splitting a String into a LinkedList, utilizing other utility classes JoinUtils and SplitUtils.

classes.name: StringUtils
classes.description: A singleton object providing string utility functions.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Converts a LinkedList into a String by delegating to JoinUtils.join.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a String into a LinkedList by delegating to SplitUtils.split.
